occupation: Chief Marketing Officer at PATTISON Outdoor
headline: Chief Marketing Officer at Pattison Outdoor  Advertising
summary:
I’ve been fortunate to have a corporate career that has been divided equally across advertising agencies, media sales, and senior marketing leadership. That balance has shaped how I think and lead: creatively, commercially, and strategically.

I started in the agency world of the 90s, including time at TBWA Chiat/Day in Toronto, where I learned the value of bold ideas and cross-functional collaboration. Since 2002, I’ve been with PATTISON Outdoor, one of Canada’s largest media companies and a division of the Jim Pattison Group—Canada’s second-largest privately held company.

As part of the senior executive leadership team at PATTISON Outdoor, I lead a multidisciplinary team responsible for:

	•	Marketing strategy and brand communications
	•	Market/industry research and audience analytics
	•	Media relations and corporate communications
	•	Creative: Marketing team and the     Ad Design team 

Outside of my corporate work, I’m pursuing (part-time) a Master of Arts in Theology, an area of study that challenges me to sharpen my critical thinking and elevates my writing, both of which continue to shape how I lead and communicate.

I also speak at industry events and serve as a panellist or moderator in which you’ll find me sharing my passion for marketing, advertising, sales and leadership. 

Now in my third decade of corporate experience, I especially enjoy speaking to women navigating career growth—bringing practical insight, honest perspective, and the strategic mindset that’s often missing in surface-level advice.

Opinions are my own. Always open to good conversations, speaking opportunities, and meaningful collaboration.

experiences.title: Vice President, Marketing & Business Development
experiences.description:
Lead a high performing, agile, cross-functional department aligned with the company’s long and short term growth objectives.

Set the vision, goals and direction for multiple specialized units:

MarCom: B2B brand awareness, lead & demand generation, CRM/account based marketing, content creation across multiple communication channels, copywriting, digital marketing, SEO/SEM

Product Marketing: Collaboration with sales, operations, leasing, production and charting to facilitate sales collateral for various vertical product lines 

Research: A diverse team utilizing syndicated and custom studies as well as geospatial analytics to support Account Executives at all stages of the sales funnel. Conducts data analysis in support of Business Development efforts.

Creative Marketing: Graphic Design, Video Production, Animation, Motion Graphics 

Creative Services: Copywriting and art direction for the creation of Out-of-Home advertising across a vast array of our B2C & B2B clients
